channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Hurricane Helene Affects Fires Burning In Georgia Right Now
item.description: Wildfires are ravaging parts of Georgia and northern Florida. Drought is a significant factor. Here's why Hurricane Helene may also be playing a role ...

item.title: Quordle Hints Today: Friday, April 24 Clues And Answers
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: The AI Paradox: Why World-Class Algorithms Fail On Second-Class Data
item.description: In 2026, tech leaders are learning a painful lesson: the problem with scaling AI adoption isn't understanding the algorithm, it's the data you put int...

item.title: Here’s Everything The New ‘Crimson Desert’ Patch Just Broke
item.description: Crimson Desert just rolled out its biggest patch ever, but it broke a whole lot of important things in the game. Here's a list.

item.title: Your Period, Your Proteins, Your Health
item.description: Nearly 200 blood proteins rise and fall across the menstrual cycle, enabling a test that pinpoints cycle day and links it to risks like fibroids and h...

item.title: Consumers outnumber producers
item.description: New technology often upends the careers of experienced professionals. When the Mac offered typesetting to the masses, typographers were incensed. They...

item.title: The banal djinni
item.description: Technology changes things. Sometimes better, sometimes worse. When a powerful new technology arrives, it offers us wishes. Too often, we waste them, a...

item.title: The right sort of friction
item.description: If we remove impediments that are in the way of where our customers seek to go, they support us. But when we remove the friction that gives people tra...

item.title: Is it sciatica?
item.description: Sometimes, back pain is felt in the thighs or even the ankles. But treating the part that hurts does nothing to address the real problem. Most busines...

item.title: The Petrillo complications
item.description: 80 years ago, the most important person in the music business was James Petrillo. It’s difficult to imagine the head of the musician’s union on the co...
